doc: Declarative spec. The agent substitutes <placeholders> and EXECUTES. MCP paths: ../../../_framework/porter-mcp-calls.md

queries.big_result: persisted to file; export to CSV and pass to process.py

process: process.py <csv|json> -> routing_plan (term -> correct owner + negatives) + skipped_intentional, sorted by spend
llm_step: none in the typical case (the owner is chosen by match-type + product code, deterministic). The model only intervenes if the 'right product' is ambiguous.
